headline: Teradyne (TER) Is One Of Jim Cramer’s Top Performing 2026 Stocks
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer’s Biggest Winners to Buy: Top 20 AI & Other Stocks He Got Right in 2026. Teradyne Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. headline: Axon and Rocket Lab rallied while chip stocks sank
summary: SanDisk Corp. (SNDK) closed out the holiday-shortened week as the Nasdaq’s biggest loser, ending Thursday at $1,745 a share, down 26% for the week, according to Seeking Alpha. Micron (MU), Western Digital (WDC), Seagate (STX) and Teradyne (TER) fell alongside it, each posting double-digit weekly ...
